name: io.github.basedosdados/mcp
description: Exposes the Base dos Dados (basedosdados.org) API as tools for AI agents: metadata search, BigQuery queries, and metadata registration.

environmentVariables.description: Target backend environment: local, dev, staging, or prod. Defaults to dev.
environmentVariables.name: ENV

environmentVariables.description: GCP project charged for BigQuery queries. Falls back to ~/.basedosdados/credentials.json (gcp_project).
environmentVariables.name: GCP_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Base dos Dados backend token (bdtoken_...). Required only for write tools; falls back to ~/.basedosdados/credentials.json.
environmentVariables.name: BACKEND_TOKEN
